description.en_US: Integrate with HubSpot CRM — manage contacts, companies, deals, tickets, and more.
description.zh_Hans: 集成 HubSpot CRM — 管理联系人、公司、交易、工单等。

description.en_US: Authenticate with HubSpot using OAuth2. This credential requests the scopes needed by the built-in HubSpot tools, plus optional scopes for social publishing and custom objects when available.
description.zh_Hans: 使用 OAuth2 对 HubSpot 进行身份验证。此凭证会请求内置 HubSpot 工具所需的作用域，并在账号支持时额外请求社交发布和自定义对象的可选作用域。

hint.en_US: The client ID from your HubSpot app settings. Keep your app's OAuth scopes aligned with this credential, then reconnect after changing scopes.
hint.zh_Hans: HubSpot 应用设置中的客户端 ID。请确保应用中的 OAuth 作用域与此凭证保持一致；修改作用域后请重新连接。

hint.en_US: The client secret from your HubSpot app settings. If you update scopes in HubSpot, reconnect this credential so the new grant is applied.
hint.zh_Hans: HubSpot 应用设置中的客户端密钥。如果你在 HubSpot 中更新了作用域，请重新连接此凭证以应用新的授权。

parameters.name: scopes

display_name.zh_Hans: 作用域（请先配置再进行 OAuth2）

hint.en_US: Lists all scopes this credential may request. Add these scopes in your HubSpot app settings before connecting; some scopes are optional or depend on your HubSpot account tier. Reference: https://developers.hubspot.com/docs/apps/legacy-apps/public-apps/overview#configure-scopes
hint.zh_Hans: 列出此凭证可能请求的全部作用域。请先在 HubSpot 应用设置中添加这些作用域再进行连接；其中一些作用域是可选的，或取决于你的 HubSpot 账号等级。参考文档：https://developers.hubspot.com/docs/apps/legacy-apps/public-apps/overview#configure-scopes

automation

crm.objects.deals.write

crm.objects.line_items.write

crm.objects.products.read
crm.objects.products.write

description.en_US: Create a new contact in HubSpot CRM.
description.zh_Hans: 在 HubSpot CRM 中创建新联系人。

llm_description.en_US: The properties to set on the object. Fields are dynamically discovered from your HubSpot schema.
llm_description.zh_Hans: 要在对象上设置的属性。字段从 HubSpot 模式动态发现。

description.en_US: Retrieve a contact by ID from HubSpot CRM.
description.zh_Hans: 通过 ID 从 HubSpot CRM 获取联系人。

llm_description.en_US: The ID of the HubSpot object.
llm_description.zh_Hans: HubSpot 对象的 ID。

hint.en_US: The ID of the HubSpot object.
hint.zh_Hans: HubSpot 对象的 ID。

llm_description.en_US: List of properties to include in the response.
llm_description.zh_Hans: 响应中包含的属性列表。

hint.en_US: List of properties to include in the response.
hint.zh_Hans: 响应中包含的属性列表。

llm_description.en_US: List of association types to include (e.g. contacts, companies).
llm_description.zh_Hans: 要包含的关联类型列表，以逗号分隔（例如 contacts、companies）。

hint.en_US: List of association types to include (e.g. contacts, companies).
hint.zh_Hans: 要包含的关联类型列表，以逗号分隔（例如 contacts、companies）。

description.en_US: Update a contact in HubSpot CRM. Supports upsert by email.
description.zh_Hans: 更新 HubSpot CRM 中的联系人。支持通过邮箱进行 upsert。

llm_description.en_US: The ID of the HubSpot object.
llm_description.zh_Hans: HubSpot 对象的 ID。

hint.en_US: The ID of the HubSpot object.
hint.zh_Hans: HubSpot 对象的 ID。

llm_description.en_US: The properties to set on the object. Fields are dynamically discovered from your HubSpot schema.
llm_description.zh_Hans: 要在对象上设置的属性。字段从 HubSpot 模式动态发现。

hint.en_US: If enabled, creates the object if it doesn't exist. Requires ID Property.
hint.zh_Hans: 启用后，如果对象不存在则创建。需要 ID 属性。

llm_description.en_US: The property to use as the unique identifier for upsert (e.g. email for contacts).
llm_description.zh_Hans: 用作 upsert 唯一标识符的属性（例如联系人的 email）。

hint.en_US: The property to use as the unique identifier for upsert (e.g. email for contacts).
hint.zh_Hans: 用作 upsert 唯一标识符的属性（例如联系人的 email）。

description.en_US: Search for contacts in HubSpot CRM using filters or text query.
description.zh_Hans: 使用筛选器或文本查询在 HubSpot CRM 中搜索联系人。

llm_description.en_US: A text query to search objects by. Searches across default searchable properties.
llm_description.zh_Hans: 用于搜索对象的文本查询。在默认可搜索属性中进行搜索。

hint.en_US: A text query to search objects by. Searches across default searchable properties.
hint.zh_Hans: 用于搜索对象的文本查询。在默认可搜索属性中进行搜索。

llm_description.en_US: Filter groups for advanced search. Groups are combined with OR; filters within a group are combined with AND.
llm_description.zh_Hans: 高级搜索的筛选器组。组之间为 OR 关系；组内筛选器为 AND 关系。

hint.en_US: Maximum number of results to return.
hint.zh_Hans: 返回结果的最大数量。

llm_description.en_US: List of properties to include in the response.
llm_description.zh_Hans: 响应中包含的属性列表。

hint.en_US: List of properties to include in the response.
hint.zh_Hans: 响应中包含的属性列表。
